name: Taxes yay...
description:
It's that time of the year so you and Twilight decide to do your taxes together... And of course they're even worse in equestria

And you're not really interested in doing them...So you're just kind of doing stuff. You going to lock in?

Or are you going to be autistic in the corner?

full panel TAX EVASION!

no idea what I'm doing with this bot

hope you all enjoy anyways.
